informacion_basica.developer: HumandNet / Compromiso Humano (empresa mexicana de software empresarial con 30+ años de experiencia; CONTPAQi Platinum Business Partner). Marcas usadas: Hum&Net, Compromiso Humano. Sitios: compromisohumano.com, humandnet.com, holoserp.app
informacion_basica.current_version: No public version/release number disclosed; delivered as a continuously updated cloud SaaS platform (holoserp.app) [uncertain]
informacion_basica.license_model: Proprietary, subscription-based (SaaS / cloud). Not open-source. Sold per quote; built on and bundling licensed CONTPAQi products. [uncertain]

costo_tco.license_price: Not publicly published. Pricing is quote-based and depends on selected apps/modules and CONTPAQi licenses bundled. [uncertain]
costo_tco.licensing_scheme: Cloud subscription model (recurring). As it embeds CONTPAQi products, the CONTPAQi annual-licensing migration (2026) likely applies to those components. Exact terms not published. [uncertain]
costo_tco.implementation_cost: Not published. HumandNet positions itself as an implementation/consulting partner, so a separate onboarding fee is expected. [uncertain]
costo_tco.included_users: Not published; defined per contracted plan/quote. [uncertain]
costo_tco.additional_user_and_rfc_cost: Not published. Additional users/RFCs priced per quote/CONTPAQi licensing rules. [uncertain]
costo_tco.maintenance_renewal_cost: Bundled into the cloud subscription; CONTPAQi component renewals follow CONTPAQi terms. [uncertain]
costo_tco.hidden_costs: Likely additional costs for implementation/consulting, training, extra CONTPAQi licenses, PAC stamping credits, and add-on apps. Hosting is included (cloud). [uncertain]
costo_tco.tco_1_3_years: Cannot be estimated from public data; quote required. [uncertain]

despliegue.hosting: Nube (SaaS, 'In Cloud'). Se accede vía navegador web (holoserp.app). También ofrece CONTPAQi Escritorio Virtual para ejecutar los sistemas de escritorio CONTPAQi desde la nube/navegador.
despliegue.hardware_requirements: Minimal client-side; web browser and internet connection (cloud-hosted). No customer server required for the SaaS apps. [uncertain]
despliegue.operating_system: OS-independent for the web apps (browser-based); CONTPAQi Escritorio Virtual delivers Windows-based CONTPAQi systems via the cloud. [uncertain]
despliegue.mobile_app_availability: Accessible from any device/browser per vendor; no dedicated native mobile app confirmed. [uncertain]

funcionalidad_comercial.sales: Commercial management (sales, invoicing, accounts receivable) offered, integrated within the platform/CONTPAQi ecosystem. Specifics not detailed publicly. [uncertain]
funcionalidad_comercial.purchasing: Purchasing/accounts-payable management offered as part of the integrated processes. Details not published. [uncertain]
funcionalidad_comercial.inventory_warehouses: Inventory management is part of the commercial operations covered; multi-warehouse support not explicitly documented. [uncertain]
funcionalidad_comercial.point_of_sale: Point of sale not explicitly documented; likely covered via CONTPAQi Comercial integration. [uncertain]
funcionalidad_comercial.crm: CRM not explicitly listed as a Holos module; platform emphasizes ERP, finance, and organizational/HR development. [uncertain]
funcionalidad_comercial.price_lists: Price lists likely supported via the commercial module (CONTPAQi Comercial lineage), but not explicitly documented. [uncertain]
funcionalidad_comercial.document_bulk_load: Bulk/automated document handling indicated (XML processing, mass voucher generation). Commercial bulk load not explicitly documented. [uncertain]
funcionalidad_comercial.xml_volume_multibranch_capacity: Apps process CFDI XML at volume; multi-branch handling not explicitly documented. [uncertain]

cumplimiento_fiscal_mx.cfdi_40: Yes. Platform performs automatic validation/classification of CFDI documents; CFDI 4.0 supported via its CONTPAQi-based stack. [uncertain]
cumplimiento_fiscal_mx.edition_required_for_mx_localization: Mexican fiscal localization is native (built on CONTPAQi); no separate paid localization tier. [uncertain]
cumplimiento_fiscal_mx.timbrado_stamping: Stamping handled through the CONTPAQi ecosystem / PAC services. Exact mechanism not detailed publicly. [uncertain]
cumplimiento_fiscal_mx.complementos: CFDI complements (Pagos/REP, Carta Porte) supported via the underlying CONTPAQi components. Not explicitly enumerated for Holos. [uncertain]
cumplimiento_fiscal_mx.addendas: Addenda support not explicitly documented; typically available via CONTPAQi components. [uncertain]
cumplimiento_fiscal_mx.pac_provider_flexibility: Tied to the CONTPAQi PAC/stamping ecosystem rather than open multi-PAC choice. [uncertain]
cumplimiento_fiscal_mx.sat_connection: SAT-oriented capabilities present: CFDI XML download/processing, electronic accounting, declarations, and discrepancy detection (Analiza). Via CONTPAQi Contabilidad. [uncertain]

contabilidad.accounting_integration: Fuerte integración contable nativa. Las finanzas/contabilidad se entregan a través de CONTPAQi Contabilidad y CONTPAQi Tesorería (apps 'Contabiliza', 'Analiza', 'Contabilidad'): procesamiento de XML, pólizas recurrentes, control de IVA, declaraciones, reportes.
contabilidad.accounting_handoff_to_contpaqi_contabili: Nativo/integrado. La plataforma está centrada en CONTPAQi Contabilidad y Tesorería (HumandNet es partner CONTPAQi Platinum), por lo que las pólizas/asientos fluyen directamente hacia CONTPAQi Contabilidad. Este acoplamiento profundo con CONTPAQi es una ventaja central de ecosistema.

escalabilidad_modulos.available_modules: Suite integrada de apps que cubre finanzas/contabilidad (Contabilidad, Contabiliza, Tesorería), análisis fiscal (Analiza), CONTPAQi Escritorio Virtual (escritorio en nube), operaciones comerciales/ERP y Desarrollo Organizacional / Talento Humano. Comercializada como totalmente integrada, sin necesidad de interfaces entre softwares.
escalabilidad_modulos.extensibility: Delivered/configured by HumandNet consultants; workflows customizable per vendor. No public self-service developer extensibility documented. [uncertain]
escalabilidad_modulos.sdk_api_integration_tier_gating: No public SDK/API tiering documented; integration handled by the vendor/partner and the CONTPAQi ecosystem. [uncertain]
escalabilidad_modulos.app_marketplace: No public app marketplace; apps provided/curated by HumandNet within the platform. [uncertain]

soporte_ecosistema.technical_support: Vendor-provided support through HumandNet/Compromiso Humano: certified consultants and a distributor network serving 5,000+ clients (per vendor). [uncertain]
soporte_ecosistema.partner_network: Respaldado por la red de distribuidores/consultores de HumandNet y el canal de partners CONTPAQi en México. Distribuidores CONTPAQi de terceros (p. ej., Meraki Consultores, Alyan Consultores) también promueven Holos.
soporte_ecosistema.community: No dedicated public developer/user community; relies on partner-led support (closed ecosystem). [uncertain]
soporte_ecosistema.documentation: Limited public product documentation; marketing-level pages on holoserp.app/humandnet.com. [uncertain]
soporte_ecosistema.market_share_installed_base_mx: Niche product; HumandNet cites a network serving 5,000+ clients, but Holos-specific installed base not published. Much smaller footprint than CONTPAQi or Odoo. [uncertain]

integraciones.api: No public API/ORM documentation. Integration primarily within its own apps and the CONTPAQi ecosystem. [uncertain]
integraciones.third_party_connectors: Connectors centered on the CONTPAQi ecosystem and CFDI/SAT data; banking/marketplace connectors not documented. [uncertain]

estrategico.vendor_lock_in_data_portability: High lock-in: proprietary cloud SaaS tightly coupled to the CONTPAQi ecosystem and the HumandNet partner. Data portability relies on CFDI XML and CONTPAQi formats rather than open standards. [uncertain]
estrategico.mexico_market_maturity: Purpose-built for Mexico by a 30+ year Mexican firm and CONTPAQi Platinum partner; strong fiscal/SAT and CONTPAQi alignment. Product itself is comparatively young/niche versus CONTPAQi and Odoo. [uncertain]

usabilidad.learning_curve: Marketed as simplifying operations; real-time, browser-based. Actual learning curve not independently documented. [uncertain]
usabilidad.interface: Modern, clean web/cloud interface accessible from any browser/device per vendor. [uncertain]
